---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected simulation behavior
title: "fix: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open the simulation at ...
2. Set [slider/setting] to ...
3. Wait for [X] ticks / trigger [Y] event
4. Observe ...

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

If applicable, add screenshots or a recording to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 115, Safari 17]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Simulation version / commit: [e.g. v3.0.0 or commit SHA]

## Additional Context

Any other relevant context — e.g. save file contents, console errors, reproduction rate ("happens every time" vs "rare").
